title: Breadcrumbs
description: Starts recording a trail of where you've been upon pressing a configurable keybind.
body:
# Breadcrumbs
This mod starts displaying a visually configurable trail behind you when you press a button. Useful to avoid getting lost in winding caves, remembering where you've already been when exploring structures, etc.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zbIS7PzC96Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
